63:1.arabic: إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ قَالُوا نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُهُ وَاللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ لَكَاذِبُونَ
63:1.english: When the hypocrites come to you, they say: We testify that you are the Messenger of Allah. But Allah knows that you are His Messenger, and Allah testifies that the hypocrites are liars.
63:1.score_notes: Dramatic expose of hypocrisy. Two forms of shahida in opposition — the hypocrites testify, then Allah testifies they are liars. Opening of Surah Al-Munafiqun.

lesson_use.arabic: إِذَا جَاءَكَ الْمُنَافِقُونَ قَالُوا نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ الْمُنَافِقِينَ لَكَاذِبُونَ
lesson_use.english: The hypocrites say: we testify you are Allah's Messenger. But Allah testifies that the hypocrites are liars
lesson_use.notes: Two forms in opposition. The hypocrites nashhaduu — then Allah yashhadu against them. Opening of Surah Al-Munafiqun.
